title: RTWP-Cobblemon
description: A 1.20.1 Cobblemon Fabric Modpack with 240+ Mods that brings more to the world of Cobblemon.
body:
Experience Cobblemon on Fabric 1.20.1 with many QoL mods

This modpack was created to change cobblemon with as many QoL mods as possible. With mods changing a lot of minecraft there shouldn't be any dull moment.

There are Backpack, chests, and sorting mods to enhance storage.
Many new blocks, structures and world generation mods to change the way Minecraft looks.
Added many cosmetic items mods to the pack for fun.
Added more Armor and Weapons to fight against mobs.


REQUIREMENTS

I recommend at least 5 GB of allocated RAM for smooth gameplay!



MULTIPLAYER

Can be installed on a server [copy mods folder to server]
5 GB minimum 
7 GB Recommended
